title: Function template parameters should be named if referenced
description: C++20 introduces full template support for lambda functions on par with the regular template functions. The full template syntax for a lambda adds a template-arguments clause after the capture clause. For example: []<typename T>(T arg) { return arg; } Although more verbose than using auto for the types of the arguments, this syntax enables you to name the types for the parameters, constrain these types, and reuse these types for multiple parameters.
recommendation: Name template parameters when they are referenced multiple times.

checks.message: Name template parameters when they are referenced multiple times.
